theme_notes: Drawn from Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's July 4th wedding outside MSG, Erling Haaland's Norway eliminating Brazil from the World Cup Round of 16, Trump's darkly political America-250 speech in 115-degree DC heat (parade canceled), and the report that 1 million Trump memecoin buyers lost money.
settled: Perfectly balanced. Even the Vatican hasn't excommunicated either of you. Yet.
Zero debt. Rarer than Haaland missing a penalty. Enjoy it while it lasts.
Clean slate. America's 250 years old and couldn't manage this. Congratulations.
youOwe: Less than a Trump memecoin. And somehow worth less, which is saying something.
The July 4th parade was canceled for 115-degree heat. Your debt has similar energy.
Norway dispatched Brazil faster than you'll settle this forty bucks.
Enough for a World Cup nosebleed seat. You don't deserve anything closer.
That's a Trump memecoin at its brief, glorious peak. Not a compliment.
Haaland beat Brazil with less drama than you bring to this sixty bucks.
Four hundred dollars. The Iran deal fell apart for less emotional investment.
Enough to buy Taylor Swift wedding merch from a scalper outside MSG. Don't.
Brazil's entire World Cup exit was less humiliating than this running tab.
Almost a grand. Even Trump's memecoin investors didn't lose this slowly.
This much owed is basically a geopolitical incident. Expect chants.
The July 4th parade hit 115 degrees and folded. Your excuses are getting there.
The Venezuela earthquake left cleaner wreckage than your tab.
The U.S.-Iran war was cheaper per month than your share of this relationship.
At this level you're not a partner. You're a hostile foreign actor.
They've held multi-day state funerals for smaller losses than this.
America declared war over less provocation. Sleep with one eye open.
Taylor and Travis got married. You just got poorer. The gap is widening.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a Trump memecoin. That's the entire problem.
Thirty bucks. Even at 115 degrees someone collected the entrance fee.
Pocket change owed. Collect it with Norway-eliminating-Brazil energy.
A hundred and change. Even the Vatican collects its debts. Time to act papal.
They owe you more than Canada owed Morocco in that World Cup embarrassment.
Haaland got paid more for that second goal alone. You've earned this.
Less than a Taylor Swift wedding front-row ticket — still three hundred, and still yours.
The Venezuela miracle rescue took 8 days. You've waited longer for this payment.
Enough for a World Cup Round of 16 seat. Go alone. Leave them the bill.
Eight hundred owed. The Khamenei funeral had more closure than this debt.
The Vatican excommunicated bishops for less disloyalty than this unpaid grand.
This is geopolitically significant now. Negotiate accordingly.
More than the average memecoin buyer lost. They owe you AND the algorithm.
Fly to Mexico City for the World Cup quarterfinals and ghost them. It's math.
Four thousand owed. Chants for revenge are appropriate and historically precedented.
The U.S.-Iran war was easier to resolve than your Venmo history.
This debt has outlasted a supreme leader. Take a hint.
At this scale you're not owed money. You're owed a state funeral.
